title: HTI Soft Weighted Food Plush Toy for Toddlers – Sensory Cuddle Companion for Ages 18M+ – Stuffed Nursery Animal Gift – Assorted Designs (Claude Croissant)
features: 🧸 CUTE FOOD-THEMED PLUSH TOYS FOR TODDLERS – SENSORY CUDDLE COMPANIONS FOR AGES 18 MONTHS+ Bring smiles, snuggles, and sensory comfort into your little one’s world with these adorable food plush toys – soft, squishy cuddle buddies shaped like fun foods! Each plush toy features a loveable character like a croissant, avocado, watermelon, or pretzel, making them perfect for toddlers, preschoolers, and even older children who enjoy imaginative play and sensory stimulation.

Measuring approximately 15cm x 15cm, these kawaii-style stuffed animals are the perfect size for tiny hands, nursery shelves, or bedtime cuddles. A fun and cozy addition to any playroom, crib, or cot mobile setup, these plush pals also make great decor pieces for toddler bedrooms and nurseries.

🌙 WEIGHTED FOR COMFORT – DESIGNED TO CALM, SOOTHE & SUPPORT SENSORY DEVELOPMENT Each plushie is slightly weighted, offering gentle sensory input for toddlers and kids who benefit from tactile stimulation, emotional regulation, and stress relief. These plush toys feel like a warm, comforting hug, making them a helpful addition to: 🛌 Bedtime routines or naptime 🧠 Sensory play or calm-down corners 🧸 Quiet time activities, tummy time, or soft toy collections 🧘 Children with ADHD, anxiety, autism, or sensory processing needs Perfect for boys and girls who love plush animals, squishy textures, or cuddle time after a long day of play.

🎁 THE ULTIMATE GIFT FOR BABIES, TODDLERS & PRESCHOOLERS Looking for a cute and practical gift that kids and parents will both love? These soft food plushies are ideal for: 🎁 First birthday presents 🍼 Newborn baby gifts 🎉 Party bag fillers or pass-the-parcel surprises 🎄 Christmas stocking stuffers 🐣 Easter basket treats 🛍️ Everyday comfort toys or bedtime buddies Loved by fans of soft toys, dolls, teddies, and fun animal-shaped characters, these plushies are great for boys and girls, nursery gifts, and even travel comforters.

🛋️ MULTIFUNCTIONAL – FOR PLAYTIME, BEDTIME & ROOM DECOR These compact plush toys double as: 🧸 Soft pillows for little heads 🛏️ Nursery or playroom decor (perfect shelf display size) 🧺 Lightweight carry-along toys for prams, pushchairs, or car rides 📚 Bedtime story companions or naptime snuggle toys Soft, durable, and easy to clean, they’re ready to go from playroom to bedtime with ease.

✅ SAFE, HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS FOR EVERYDAY HUGS Crafted from premium plush fabric with baby-safe materials, each toy is built to last through endless snuggles and gentle play. With strong stitching and non-toxic filling, these food friends are: ✔️ Safe for children aged 18M+ 🧼 Easy to clean with a damp cloth 📏 Just the right size for small hands and big cuddles 🧸 Great for use in cribs, nurseries, or on-the-go

These adorable, soft, and soothing plush toys are more than just cuddly—they’re sensory friends for calm, comfort, and imaginative play. Add one to your child’s collection or gift them all for endless cuddles and smiles! 🧸💕
description: "🧸 ADORABLE FOOD-THEMED PLUSH TOYS FOR TODDLERS 18M+ Squish-Yums plush toys feature fun and lovable food characters including Claude Croissant, Archie Avocado, Winnie Watermelon, and Pierre Pretzel. Measuring approximately 15cm x 15cm, these soft, kawaii-style stuffed animals are perfect cuddle companions for toddlers and preschoolers. They add a playful and cozy touch to any nursery or playroom collection.🧸 SLIGHTLY WEIGHTED FOR SENSORY COMFORT & CALMING Each plush toy is slightly weighted to provide a comforting and calming experience, ideal for toddlers 18 months and up. The gentle weight supports sensory development, emotional regulation, and relaxation during naptime, quiet time, or bedtime. These plush pals are designed to feel like a warm hug, making them the perfect cuddly companion for little ones.🎁 PERFECT GIFT IDEA FOR BABIES, TODDLERS & KIDS Looking for a unique and adorable gift? Squish-Yums plush toys are excellent presents for baby showers, birthdays, holidays, or everyday surprises. These food-themed plushies delight both boys and girls with their soft texture and lovable designs. Safe for toddlers 18M+, they’re toddler-approved gifts that bring joy and comfort.🛋️ MULTI-FUNCTIONAL PLUSH TOYS FOR PLAY & DECOR More than just cuddly toys, Squish-Yums plushies serve as soft pillows and charming nursery decor. Their compact 15cm size makes them easy to hold and carry, while their lightweight yet slightly weighted design adds to their sensory appeal. Perfect for imaginative play, cozy cuddles, or as a cute accent on beds and shelves.✅ HIGH-QUALITY, BABY-SAFE MATERIALS FOR DAILY HUGS Crafted with premium, safe plush fabric and durable stitching, Squish-Yums toys are built to last through daily hugs and play sessions. Designed for toddlers 18 months and older, these plush toys meet strict safety standards and provide parents with peace of mind. Soft, durable, and irresistibly cute—Squish-Yums make everyday snuggles extra special."
